task_completion.description: Set the form name to 'Fall Risk Assessment' and form type to 'Visit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the custom form creation screen, the 'Name' input field contains 'Fall Risk Assessment' and the 'Type' dropdown/selection is set to 'Visit' (or 'visit').

task_completion.description: Add the 'Age Group' field with correct property and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field entry exists with Label 'Age Group', Property 'ageGroup', and Type 'Text' (or 'text').

task_completion.description: Add the 'Fall History' field with correct property, type, and options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field entry exists with Label 'Fall History', Property 'fallHistory', Type 'Select', and options containing 'None', 'One fall in past 6 months', and 'Multiple falls'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Mobility Status' field with correct property, type, and options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field entry exists with Label 'Mobility Status', Property 'mobilityStatus', Type 'Select', and options containing 'Independent', 'Uses assistive device', and 'Requires assistance'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Cognitive Impairment' field with correct property and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field entry exists with Label 'Cognitive Impairment', Property 'cognitiveImpairment', and Type 'Checkbox' (or 'checkbox').

task_completion.description: Add the 'Assessment Notes' field with correct property and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field entry exists with Label 'Assessment Notes', Property 'assessmentNotes', and Type 'Text Area' (or 'textarea').
A success notification indicating the form was saved, or the 'Fall Risk Assessment' form appearing in the main list/table of custom forms in the Administration section.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun web interface to create the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the HospitalRun web application in a browser, with form fields being actively filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly inserting data into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like pgAdmin, MongoDB Compass, or terminal DB shells) in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered the field details into the form builder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the intermediate steps of adding fields, typing labels/properties, and selecting types from dropdowns within the HospitalRun UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom form must be named 'Fall Risk Assessment' with type 'visit'. It must contain exactly 5 fields in order: 1. Label: 'Age Group', Property: 'ageGroup', Type: 'text'. 2. Label: 'Fall History', Property: 'fallHistory', Type: 'select', Options: 'None', 'One fall in past 6 months', 'Multiple falls'. 3. Label: 'Mobility Status', Property: 'mobilityStatus', Type: 'select', Options: 'Independent', 'Uses assistive device', 'Requires assistance'. 4. Label: 'Cognitive Impairment', Property: 'cognitiveImpairment', Type: 'checkbox'. 5. Label: 'Assessment Notes', Property: 'assessmentNotes', Type: 'textarea'.
